gartenbereich.label: Gartenbereich
gartenbereich.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Gartenbereiche' with the id `69ac684a7a71d66a8bcf9a19` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69ac684a7a71d66a8bcf9a19/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

aufgaben.label: Aufgaben
aufgaben.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Saisonale Aufgaben' with the id `69ac684f4e04afa6767a4c6e` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69ac684f4e04afa6767a4c6e/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

geplante_jahreszeit.label: Geplante Jahreszeit
geplante_jahreszeit.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

geplanter_zeitraum.label: Geplanter Zeitraum
geplanter_zeitraum.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

planungsnotizen.label: Notizen zur Planung
planungsnotizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

bereichsname.label: Name des Gartenbereichs
bereichsname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

lage.label: Lage
lage.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

notizen.label: Besondere Hinweise
notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

gartenbereich_arbeit.label: Gartenbereich
gartenbereich_arbeit.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Gartenbereiche' with the id `69ac684a7a71d66a8bcf9a19` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69ac684a7a71d66a8bcf9a19/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

datum.label: Datum der Durchführung
datum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

durchgefuehrte_arbeiten.label: Durchgeführte Arbeiten
durchgefuehrte_arbeiten.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

zeitaufwand.label: Zeitaufwand
zeitaufwand.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

wetter.label: Wetterbedingungen
wetter.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beobachtungen.label: Beobachtungen
beobachtungen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

foto.label: Foto (optional)
foto.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69ac6850bdf7c76fbace388c/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

geplante_pflege.label: Geplante Pflegemaßnahme (optional)
geplante_pflege.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Pflegeplanung' with the id `69ac68506c4047109f2ef1b3` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69ac68506c4047109f2ef1b3/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

aufgabenname.label: Name der Aufgabe
aufgabenname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

jahreszeit.label: Jahreszeit(en)
jahreszeit.description:
Arbitrary number of selected options out of multiple available ones.

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be a list of keys from this `lookup_data` attribute.

Displayed as multiple checkbox fields in HTML pages.

haeufigkeit.label: Häufigkeit
haeufigkeit.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

dauer_schaetzung.label: Geschätzte Dauer
dauer_schaetzung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

anleitung.label: Anleitung/Tipps
anleitung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).
